meta.source: VCCP x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026
meta.provenance: All values computed from data-src/cocl_segmented.csv or read from data-src/cocl_crosstab.json; verified against docs/deck-narrative.md (canonical).

In control of my financial future

moneySavingMoves.source: VCCP x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026
moneySavingMoves.measure: % who did this in the last 3 months

tradingDownByCategory.source: VCCP x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026
tradingDownByCategory.measure: % who traded down in the last 12 months

protectedSpend.source: VCCP x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026
protectedSpend.measure: % actively protecting this non-essential because it matters to their happiness or wellbeing

availabilityConcerns.source: VCCP x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026
availabilityConcerns.measure: % very or extremely concerned about availability (not just price) in the coming months

institutionTrust.source: VCCP x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026

headline.nhsMeanScoreNote: NHS trust score out of 10 - the highest of any institution
headline.nhsDeclinedNote: Yet 53% say NHS performance has declined over the past decade
headline.trustSpread: NHS 53% confident at the top to Government 24% at the bottom - a 29-point spread

confidenceRanking.measure: % confident (7-10 out of 10) the institution will reliably support them over the next 12 months

performanceChange.measure: % saying performance has declined (somewhat or significantly) over the past 10 years

aiTasks.source: VCCP x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026
aiTasks.measure: % who used AI tools instead of a human professional or traditional service in the last 6 months
aiTasks.anyTaskNote: Have used AI instead of a human professional for at least one task
aiTasks.highStakesNote: Used AI for at least one high-stakes task (financial advice, health information, or legal/admin)

surveyByAudience.source: VCCP Media x Watermelon Research COCL survey, 1,504 UK adults 18+, nat rep, May 2026
surveyByAudience.note: Every survey question reformatted by audience. Adapters=Architects, Strivers=Hustlers. pct = penetration within the audience; index = audience vs sample average (100 = average). All values read directly from State_of_Independence_Survey_by_Audience.xlsx (Crosstab); nothing inferred.

items.label: I feel optimistic and in control
